## Relevant console errors

Paste anything from the browser console — RAX Theme's own errors are always
prefixed `[RaxX]` (e.g. `[RaxTheme]`, `[RaxRegistry]`), which helps narrow
down which module is involved.

## Additional context

Anything else — e.g. does this happen with a plugin loaded via
`RAX_PLUGINS`? Does it happen on a fresh page load or only after switching
theme/accent?
